settings.title: Meet the Trainees Behind the Desk
settings.excerpt: Our two newest trainee solicitors on what their first six months at the firm have actually been like.
settings.body:
People imagine a law firm as rows of senior partners. A lot of the careful work happens earlier in a career, with trainees who are learning the craft.

This year we welcomed two trainee solicitors, Marcus and Leila, who rotate through our property, commercial, and family teams over two years. We asked them what surprised them most.

The answer from both was how much of the job is listening. Before any letter is drafted, there is a client who needs to feel they have been heard and understood. That is the part no textbook teaches, and the part we care most about getting right.
